title: BS EN 1999-1-1:2007 Aluminium Member Design
description: Design aluminium members in accordance with BS EN 1999-1-1:2007.

s3d_section.description: Section ID. Symbol: Section. Section object imported from S3D model.

b.description: Width (b). Units: mm. The width of the section.

d.description: Depth (d). Units: mm. The depth of the section for custom shapes, this is used as an override for the leg height.

t1.description: Flanges Thickness (t1). Symbol: t_{1}. Units: mm. Thickness of the flanges for custom Shapes.

t2.description: Webs Thickness (t2). Symbol: t_{2}. Units: mm. Thickness of the web.

Ly.description: Span (Ly). Symbol: L_{y}. Units: m. The span of the member, as unbraced length about the Y (minor) direction.

Lz.description: Span (Lz). Symbol: L_{z}. Units: m. The span of the member, as unbraced length about the Z (major) direction.

design_class.description: Design Class. Symbol: Class. Material Buckling Class.

end_post_rigidity.description: Rigid end-post. Symbol: Rigid end-post. According to BS EN 1999-1-1:2023 Figure 8.30.

stiff_bearing.description: Stiff bearing type. Symbol: Stiff bearing type. According to BS EN 1999-1-1:2007 Figure 6.33.

khw.description: Reduction coefficient due to holes in the web (khw). Symbol: k_{hw}. Reduction coefficient due to holes in the web.

khf.description: Reduction coefficient due to holes in the flanges (khf). Symbol: k_{hf}. Reduction coefficient due to holes in the flanges.

Ss.description: Length of stiff bearing (Ss). Symbol: s_{s}. Units: mm. Length of stiff bearing Figure 6.33.

a_st.description: Distance between web stiffeners (ast). Symbol: a_{st}. Units: mm. Distance between web stiffeners Figure 6.33.

a_w.description: Weld size of web to flange (aw). Symbol: a_{st}. Units: mm. Weld size of web to flange

c.description: Distance from the applied force to the edge of the element (c). Symbol: a_{st}. Units: mm. distance from the edge Figure 6.33.

F_Ed.description: Transversal force. Symbol: F_{Ed}. Units: kN. Magnitude of the force applied Figure 6.33.

Mz.description: Major Bending (Mz). Symbol: M_{z}. Units: kN-m. Moment about Z (major) direction.

My.description: Minor Bending (My). Symbol: M_{y}. Units: kN-m. Moment about Y (minor) direction.

Mx.description: Torsional Moment (Mx). Symbol: M_{x}. Units: kN-m. Moment in Torsion.

Vy.description: Minor Shear (Vy). Symbol: V_{y}. Units: kN. Shear in Y (minor) direction.

Vz.description: Major Shear (Vz). Symbol: V_{z}. Units: kN. Shear in Z (major) direction.

Nc.description: Axial Compression (Nc). Symbol: N_{c}. Units: kN. Axial compression.

Nt.description: Axial Tension (Nt). Symbol: N_{t}. Units: kN. Axial tension.

gamma_M1.description: Safety - Cross Section (γ1). Symbol: γ_{m1}. Partial factor of safety-cross section.

gamma_M2.description: Safety - Member Instability (γ2). Symbol: γ_{m2}. Partial factor of safety-member instability.

k.description: Effect of Holes (k). Factor to consider the effect of holes in case of tension/compression.

Kz.description: Effective Length Parameter (kz). Symbol: k_{z}. Effective length parameter about Z (major) direction.

Ky.description: Effective Length Parameter (ky). Symbol: k_{y}. Effective length parameter about Y (minor) direction.

Kt.description: Effective Length Parameter (kT). Symbol: k_{z}. Effective length parameter fot torsion.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
